svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 28px; margin-left: 400px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 本番リリース手順フロー（BE → DB → FE-MA → FE-HA）

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 105px; margin-left: 201px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Step 1: PostgreSQL
docker-compose up -d postgres
sqlx migrate run --database-url ...
確認: _sqlx_migrations 全件 success=TRUE

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 245px; margin-left: 201px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Step 2: axum バックエンド
docker-compose up -d backend
curl /health → 200 OK 確認
確認: ポート 8080 疎通

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 385px; margin-left: 201px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Step 3: マスタメンテ React アプリ
npm run build → IIS ディレクトリに配置
ブラウザで HTTPS アクセス確認
確認: ログイン画面表示・quality_admin ログイン成功

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 535px; margin-left: 201px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Step 4: ハンディ APP 配布
Android: EAS Build → APK/AAB 配布
iOS: EAS Build → TestFlight/MDM
Windows: MSIX 社内配布
確認: 全端末で本番 URL 接続 + 作業開始可能

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 398px; height: 1px; padding-top: 665px; margin-left: 201px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
リリース完了宣言
quality_admin 署名付きアナウンス
全作業員への周知完了
